SELECT customers.customer_id, customers.name  
FROM customers  
JOIN orders ON customers.customer_id = orders.customer_id  
WHERE orders.order_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY  
GROUP BY customers.customer_id  
HAVING COUNT(orders.order_id) > 5;  
The query structure and table names are drawn directly from the text, with the condition for "more than 5 orders in the last 30 days" shaping the WHERE clause and HAVING clause.

Accessing memory after it has been freed is causing the segmentation fault. The explanation will highlight that `free(ptr)` deallocates the memory, making `ptr[0] = 42` an invalid operation. The code snippet directly selects this diagnosis.

SELECT customers.name, SUM(orders.total_value) AS total_order_value  
FROM orders  
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.id  
WHERE orders.order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAY  
GROUP BY customers.name  
ORDER BY total_order_value DESC  
LIMIT 5;  
The request for a SQL query to find top customers by order value in the last 30 days selects the aggregation, filtering, and sorting operations.

The Monty Hall problem is a probability puzzle involving three doors, one hiding a prize and two hiding nothing. After you pick a door, the host reveals an empty door among the two you didn’t choose. Switching doors increases your probability of winning because the initial choice has a 1/3 chance, while the unchosen door has a 2/3 chance due to the host’s action eliminating one losing option.

Radiometric dating using uranium-lead decay in zircon crystals involves measuring the ratios of uranium isotopes to their lead decay products. Uranium-238 decays to lead-206 and uranium-235 to lead-207 at known rates, allowing precise age calculations. Zircon crystals are ideal because they trap uranium but exclude lead during formation, preserving decay data. This method determines the ages of Earth's oldest rocks by analyzing zircon samples from ancient geological formations.

基于全球实现碳中和未来的目标，核能的扩展是满足日益增长的电力需求并减少环境影响的重要选择。为了使核能更加可持续和安全，闭合燃料循环至关重要，其中乏燃料（SNF）的再处理是关键环节。几十年来，人们开发了多种工艺来提取具有利用和处理价值的放射性核素，包括PUREX（钚-铀萃取）、UNEX（通用萃取）、FPEX（裂变产物萃取）等。这些工艺涉及使用各种溶剂分子选择性地与液态混合物中的特定阳离子结合，该混合物通常具有高腐蚀性和放射性。因此，系统研究配体与这些工艺中涉及的阳离子的配位化学无疑有助于推动乏燃料再处理技术和核废料管理策略的发展。

The El Niño/Southern Oscillation (ENSO) represents a recurring climate pattern defined by irregular variations in tropical Pacific sea surface temperatures and atmospheric convection (Neelin, 1998; McPhaden, 2006; Deser, 2010). Intensified tropical Pacific ENSO-related precipitation, likely amplified by rising surface temperatures (Power, 2013; Cai, 2014; Huang, 2015), can trigger adverse weather events globally, posing threats to agriculture, ecosystems, and economic stability (Alexander, 2002; Yan, 2020).

Rank Preserving Structural Failure Time Model (RPSFTM) adjusts survival data when patients switch treatments during an oncology trial. It estimates what survival times would have been without the switch, preserving the rank order of survival times. For example, if a patient switches from the control group to the experimental treatment, RPSFTM recalculates their survival time as if they had stayed in the control group, ensuring fair comparison across groups.
